idle: tiny breathing in, shoulders slightly up
tiny breathing out, shoulders slightly down
speaking: mouth half open, slight hand emphasis
agree: right hand raises to chest height
right hand raised high, positive expression
right hand lowers to chest height
thinking: thinking pose, hand on chin, eyes up-left, slight frown
takes out small memo pad, glancing down to confirm notes
checks memo carefully, pen near lips, focused expression
returns to thinking pose with tiny nod as if idea clicked
joy: big happy smile, both arms lifted to shoulder height, energetic stance
maximum joy, both arms raised high, eyes joyful, mouth open smile, slight upward bounce
happy settle pose, one fist pump near chest, bright smile
futon_sleep: sleepy yawn, one hand near mouth, heavy eyelids
bending down to get into futon, knees slightly bent, torso forward
inside futon up to shoulders, eyes closed, peaceful face
inside futon sleeping, visible zzz text near head, calm breathing
futon_out: inside futon sleeping, eyes closed, tiny zzz near head
waking up in futon, eyes half open, zzz disappearing
pushing blanket down, upper body rising
getting out of futon, bent forward with one knee out
standing beside futon, sleepy stretch with a small yawn
anger: annoyed face, brows down, fists clenched
angry stance, one foot forward, fists tight, mouth open shout
maximum anger, both fists up, strong frown, tense body
anger settle, one fist near chest, stern face
melancholy: sad neutral, shoulders dropped, eyes down
deeper sadness, head down, small sigh posture
melancholy pause, hand near chest, distant eyes
fun: small hop with both arms open, bright smile
playful pose, one hand on hip, grin
surprise: eyes wide, mouth open, slight lean back
peak surprise, both hands up near shoulders
study_note: ready to study, holding notebook and pen
writing faster, slight nod, concentrated face
checking notes, pen paused near chin
writing final line, satisfied tiny smile
walk_wander: step right, light forward walk, looking around
neutral passing step, arms swing naturally
step left, head turns slightly other side
